scores.notes: Code is syntactically correct and would run. Uses legacy `self.unit.status =` pattern instead of the modern `CollectStatusEvent` approach, and uses older `bases:` syntax in charmcraft.yaml instead of `base:`/`platforms:` (modern format), hence idiomatic score of 1. All requested features are implemented: install sets status, WaitingStatus when name is empty, containers+resources present, config option declared. No invented APIs.
